claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A noninteractive description shown after grouped hover/focus delay, dismissible with Escape, hoverable, persistent while valid, collision-aware, and never essential.
semantics: React Aria owns role=tooltip and adds/removes aria-describedby with the visible lifecycle.
Keyboard focus and pointer hover have parity; Escape dismisses the topmost tooltip, whose actual portal root shares LayerManager visual order with other overlays.
Content rejects interactive descendants in development guidance; actions use Popover.
DisabledTrigger remains focusable with aria-disabled=true and suppresses activation.
touchPolicy: No long press is registered. Tooltip content is supplemental and the visible trigger label or nearby text remains sufficient on touch.

preferences.forcedColors: A system-color boundary and trigger focus remain visible.
preferences.reducedMotion: Only an immediate state change remains.
preferences.rtl: start/end placement maps from provider direction independently from locale.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Content wraps within 1rem viewport gutters and collision handling flips when needed.
